name: Twist Bioscience Corp
business: Twist Bioscience Corporation has developed a disruptive DNA synthesis platform that writes DNA on a silicon chip to manufacture synthetic DNA-based products. The company sells synthetic genes, next-generation sequencing tools, and biopharma services for antibody discovery, optimization, and development. It serves a global customer base of more than 3,800 customers across healthcare, chemicals/materials, food/agriculture, and academic research.

exposures.sentence: Our biopharma services group offers the discovery trifecta in vivo, in vitro and in silico antibody discovery all under one roof.
Our NGS products are primarily used within diagnostic tests for various indications including rare disease, SARS-CoV-2 and cancer through liquid biopsy and MRD.

We believe our products and services enable a broad range of applications that may ultimately improve health and the sustainability of the planet across multiple industries, including: ... food/agriculture for more effective and sustainable crop production; ...

We believe our products and services enable a broad range of applications that may ultimately improve health and the sustainability of the planet across multiple industries, including: ... chemicals/materials for cost-effective and sustainable production of new and existing specialty chemicals and materials, such as spider silk, nylon, rubber, fragrances, food flavors and food additives; ...

catalysts.event: Lease amendment for South San Francisco facilities
catalysts.sentence: On November 13, 2025, we entered into a lease amendment for our facilities in South San Francisco, California.
The amendment also gives us the right, on or before December 31, 2026, to elect to expand the premises to include the entire fourth floor of the building containing approximately 33,000 square feet.

tamClaims.claim: Synthetic biology alone expected to have a $2-4 trillion global impact by 2030-2040.
tamClaims.sentence: Synthetic DNA is a foundational product enabling the entire bioeconomy, with synthetic biology alone expected to have a $2-4 trillion global impact by 2030-2040.
